inputs.situation_text: Our company (50 employees, B2B SaaS) is considering migrating from on-premise infrastructure to cloud. Current annual infrastructure cost is 180,000 EUR. Cloud estimates range from 120,000-150,000 EUR annually. Migration timeline estimated at 6 months. Key stakeholders: CTO (in favor), CFO (cautious about upfront costs), Head of Engineering (concerned about downtime). Two critical customer contracts require 99.9% uptime SLA. The current on-premise system had 3 unplanned outages in the past 12 months totaling 14 hours of downtime.
